videoSnippet.title: Like finding a Needle in a Haystack || Nikolas Theodorou vs Shamsiddin Vokhidov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Theodorou, Nikolas (2634) - Vokhidov, Shamsiddin (2637)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.06.10
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, 4.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 Be7 5.cxd5 exd5 6.Bf4 c6 7.h3 Bf5 8.g4 Bg6 9.e3 Qb6 10.Qe2 Nbd7 11.Nh4 Nf8 12.Bg2 Ne6 13.Be5 Nd7 14.Bg3 Bxh4 15.Bxh4 O-O 16.Qd2 Rfe8 17.O-O f6 18.f4 Bf7 19.Bf2 Nc7 20.a4 a5 21.f5 Na6 22.h4 Qd8 23.Ne2 Nb4 24.Bg3 Nb6 25.b3 Nc8 26.Bf4 Nd6 27.Ng3 Ne4 28.Bxe4 dxe4 29.g5 Kh8 30.Kh2 c5 31.gxf6 gxf6 32.Rg1 Nd3 33.Bh6 Ne5 34.Kh3 Nf3 35.Qb2 Rg8 36.dxc5 Nxg1+ 37.Rxg1 Ra6 38.Rc1 Qd5 39.c6 Rxc6 40.Rxc6 Qxc6 41.Bg5 h6 42.Bxf6+ Kh7 43.Be5 Qd5 44.Bf4 Bh5 45.Kh2 Bf3 46.Be5 Qd1 47.Qc3 Rc8
